split.unit: day_directory with meteorologically reviewed event boundaries
split.boundary_rationale: Keep the July 23-30 and August 12-14 North China rain processes out of split boundaries; test begins with the separate process starting August 15.

models.training: initialize and freeze the matched radar-only backbone; replace PWV with zeros during training and testing
initialize and freeze the matched radar-only backbone; train PWV branch; core comparison disables shuffle loss so PWV input is the only difference from zero-PWV

imbalance_control.classification: class-balanced focal: positive and negative pixels are normalized separately within each batch
imbalance_control.source_regression: active and inactive source errors are normalized separately; inactive weight=0.1
imbalance_control.decision_threshold: PR-AUC is primary; operational probability threshold must be selected on validation only

checkpoint_selection: minimum validation weighted-L1; test metrics are never used for selection
primary_metrics: event-wise paired deltas with confidence intervals
kill_test: Do not expand the architecture if real PWV fails to improve event-held-out birth/growth metrics over the matched zero-PWV head, or later fails shuffled/climatology controls.
